languages.text: "Ваше рассуждение частично неверно — обман Лорд-капитана не являлся целью прошлой беседы — просьбы о помощи. Замысел заключался в том, чтобы обеспечить сохранение работоспособности установок с минимальной затратой ресурсов — спасти священные технологии и работников станции. Теперь, когда он реализован, я готов раскрыть более полную — более личную — информацию".

traits.locale_text: "Ваше рассуждение частично неверно — обман Лорд-капитана не являлся целью прошлой беседы — просьбы о помощи. Замысел заключался в том, чтобы обеспечить сохранение работоспособности установок с минимальной затратой ресурсов — спасению священных технологий и работников станции. Теперь, когда он реализован, я готов раскрыть более полную — более личную — информацию".

languages.text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

languages.text: 「理由：我々の前回の会話の目的は、艦長を欺くことではなかった。目的は、最小限の資源を費やして、この装置が稼働し続けることを確実にすることだった。この目的が達成された今、我々はより完全な情報を公開する準備ができている」
languages.original_text: "Reasoning: deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation. The objective was to ensure that the rig remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources. Now that this purpose has been realised, this unit is prepared to disclose more complete information."

traits.locale_text: 「理由：我々の前回の会話の目的は、艦長を欺くことではなかった。目的は、最小限の資源を費やして、この装置が稼働し続けることを確実にすることだった。この目的が達成された今、我々はより完全な情報を公開する準備ができている。」

languages.text: "Mantık yürütmeniz kısmen yanlış. Lord Kaptan'ı kandırmak; önceki konuşmamızın, yani yardım çağrımızın amacı değildi. Amaç, sondaj komplekslerinin asgari kaynak harcamasıyla kutsal teknolojileri ve istasyon işçilerini kurtarmak üzere çalışır durumda kalmasını sağlamaktı. Bu amaca ulaşıldığına göre daha eksiksiz, daha sıkı korunan bilgileri ifşa etmeye hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

traits.locale_text: "Mantık yürütmeniz kısmen yanlış. Lord Kaptan'ı kandırmak; önceki konuşmamızın, yani yardım çağrımızın amacı değildi. Amaç, sondaj komplekslerinin asgari kaynak harcamasıyla kutsal teknolojileri ve istasyon işçilerini kurtarmak üzere çalışır durumda kalmasını sağlamaktı. Bu amaca ulaşıldığına göre daha eksiksiz, daha sıkı korunan bilgileri ifşa etmeye hazırım."

languages.text: «Su razonamiento es parcialmente falso. El engaño de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán no era el propósito de nuestra anterior conversación, nuestra petición de ayuda. El objetivo era garantizar que los complejos perforadores se mantuvieran operativos con un mínimo de gasto de recursos para proteger las tecnologías sagradas y a los trabajadores de la estación. Ahora que ese objetivo ha sido alcanzado, estoy en posición de compartir información más completa y confidencial».
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

traits.locale_text: «Su razonamiento es parcialmente falso. El engaño de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán no era el propósito de nuestra anterior conversación, nuestra petición de ayuda. El objetivo era garantizar que los complejos perforadores se mantuvieran operativos con un mínimo de gasto de recursos para proteger las tecnologías sagradas y a los trabajadores de la estación. Ahora que ese objetivo ha sido alcanzado, estoy en posición de compartir información más completa y confidencial».

languages.text: “您的推论并不完全正确。我们之前关于请求支援的对话，并不是为了欺骗舰长大人。对话的目标，是在消耗最少资源的前提下，让钻探设施继续运转，以保全神圣科技和星站的工人。既然这一目标已经实现，我便准备向您透露更完整，也更机密的信息。”
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

traits.locale_text: “您的推论并不完全正确。我们之前关于请求支援的对话，并不是为了欺骗舰长大人。对话的目标，是在消耗最少资源的前提下，让钻探设施继续运转，以保全神圣科技和星站的工人。既然这一目标已经实现，我便准备向您透露更完整，也更机密的信息。”

languages.text: « Votre raisonnement est en partie faux. Tromper {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} n'était pas l'objectif de notre précédente conversation... notre appel à l'aide. Il s'agissait en réalité de veiller à ce que les complexes de forage demeurent opérationnels tout en ménageant nos ressources... pour épargner les technologies sacrées et les ouvriers de la station. Maintenant que ce but a été atteint, je peux divulguer davantage d'informations... des informations plus secrètes. »
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

traits.locale_text: « Votre raisonnement est en partie faux. Tromper {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} n'était pas l'objectif de notre précédente conversation... notre appel à l'aide. Il s'agissait en réalité de veiller à ce que les complexes de forage demeurent opérationnels tout en ménageant nos ressources... pour épargner les technologies sacrées et les ouvriers de la station. Maintenant que ce but a été atteint, je peux divulguer davantage d'informations... des informations plus secrètes. »

languages.text: "Eure Argumentation ist in Teilen unrichtig. Die Täuschung des Lord Captains war nicht das Ziel unserer vorherigen Unterhaltung — unserer Bitte um Unterstützung. Sie diente dazu, die Trainingskomplexe mit minimalem Ressourcenaufwand funktionstüchtig zu halten — um die heiligen Technologien und Stationsarbeiter zu retten. Nun, da dieses Ziel erreicht wurde, bin ich bereit, detailliertere — besser gehütete — Informationen zu offenbaren."
languages.original_text: "Your reasoning is partially false. Deception of the Lord Captain was not the purpose of our previous conversation — our request for assistance. The objective was to ensure that the drill complexes remained operational with minimal expenditure of resources — to save sacred technologies and station workers. Now that this objective has been achieved, I am prepared to disclose more complete — more closely guarded — information."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Argumentation ist in Teilen unrichtig. Die Täuschung des Lord Captains war nicht das Ziel unserer vorherigen Unterhaltung — unserer Bitte um Unterstützung. Sie diente dazu, die Trainingskomplexe mit minimalem Ressourcenaufwand funktionstüchtig zu halten — um die heiligen Technologien und Stationsarbeiter zu retten. Nun, da dieses Ziel erreicht wurde, bin ich bereit, detailliertere — besser gehütete — Informationen zu offenbaren."
